since_last: 48% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.13%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 48% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.20% · BTC -0.49% · Gold +0.61% · Nasdaq100 +0.64%. 48% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.13%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.13%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.40%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SNAP is the standout at -15.50%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +12.21%, AMAT +8.63%, TLN +6.41%, LRCX +6.25%, TER +5.63%. Laggards: SNAP -15.50%, CRNC -4.23%, AMBA -4.15%, MDB -3.35%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +5.16% at $202.43
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +5.16% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
